titleStmt.title: SII 6.249: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 249. (A.R. No. 272-A of 1897). ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING NEAR THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

ntaka yŇęriyabńďtamattamńĀtaŠĻĀggasiŠĻĀggha koŠĻáŠłći

maŠĻĀŠłćalńďŇõvara koŠĻ≠a doŠłćŠłćabhńęmarńĀju laŠĻĀjyapeŠĻĀŠłćla
